title: Cobblemon: Armory
body:
Cobblemon: Armory

Gear up with your Cobblemon!

Cobblemon: Armory is an add-on for the Cobblemon mod that lets you craft armor and weapons based on your favorite Cobblemon. Each gear set is themed after a specific Cobblemon, bringing unique looks to your Minecraft adventure.

Features: Custom armor sets inspired by different Cobblemon

Unique weapons with Cobblemon-themed designs

Works alongside the Cobblemon mod

Great for trainers who want to fight in style

Take your Cobblemon experience to the next level with themed gear!

Search in buried treasure, bastion treasure and ancient cities for the smithing template

More armors added along side with community suggestions!

(Current things Armors: 19, Weapons: 7, Shields: 1)

We have a wiki!
[Cobblemon: Armory Wiki](https://cobblemon-armory.fandom.com/wiki/Cobblemon:_Armory_Wiki)

Join the Discord for faster help or to join the community!

Credit to Cobblemon for some textures used in the armors and weapons and models as well
